# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.

Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection. Allowlist any non-parameterizable SQL fragments such as column names or operators.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php
// Assuming $pdo is your PDO instance connected to the database

function generateReport($filters) {
    global $pdo;

    // Initialize query parts
    $select = "SELECT *";
    $from = "FROM reports";
    $where = [];
    $params = [];

    // Add date range filter if provided
    if (isset($filters['date_range'])) {
        list($startDate, $endDate) = explode(' - ', $filters['date_range']);
        $where[] = "(date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date)";
        $params[':start_date'] = $startDate;
        $params[':end_date'] = $endDate;
    }

    // Add status filter if provided
    if (isset($filters['status'])) {
        $where[] = "status = :status";
        $params[':status'] = $filters['status'];
    }

    // Add category filter if provided
    if (isset($filters['category'])) {
        $where[] = "category = :category";
        $params[':category'] = $filters['category'];
    }

    // Combine where clauses
    if (!empty($where)) {
        $from .= " WHERE " . implode(' AND ', $where);
    }

    // Prepare and execute the query
    $query = $pdo->prepare($from);
    $query->execute($params);

    // Fetch results
    $results = $query->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    return $results;
}

// Example usage:
if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
    $filters = $_POST;
    $reportData = generateReport($filters);
    // Process and display the report data
}
?>
